ClassificationBasis: BLM modification of existing authorized operations - CX under 43 CFR 3809.10(d) when no new significant disturbance
BLM new authorization on federal lands - EA required to assess alternatives and impacts
BLM administrative permit renewal with no change in scope or terms - CX under 516 DM 11.9(A)
BLM minor administrative amendment to existing authorization - CX under 516 DM 11.9(D)
BLM emergency stabilization/rehabilitation action - CX under 516 DM 11.9(B) for immediate threat response
BLM termination/cancellation of existing authorization - administrative action; CX under 516 DM 11.5
USFS modification of existing permitted use - CX under 36 CFR 220.6(d)(2) for administrative actions
USFS new authorization - EA required unless project-level CE applies
USFS administrative permit renewal with no change in use - CX under 36 CFR 220.6(d)(1)
DOE modification of existing facility operations within approved parameters - CX under 10 CFR 1021 Subpart D B1.31
DOE new facility authorization - EA required
USFWS modification of existing management plan with no significant change - CX under 516 DM 8.5(C)(5)
USFWS administrative permit renewal - CX under 516 DM 8.5(C)(1) for unchanged operations
EPA modification of existing approved action within original scope - CX under 40 CFR 6 Appendix A
USACE modification of existing permit within original footprint - CX under 33 CFR 230 Appendix B
USACE new Section 404/10 authorization - EA required
